Refinery1.desc: +4 Obol storage slots per upgrade! Circle, Square, Hexagon, then Sparkle, in that order.

Refinery2.desc: +{% Class EXP and Skill EXP. Not really sure what those blobulytes do with these souls...

Refinery3.desc: +{% Liquid rate and Capacity for all liquids in Alchemy.

Refinery4.desc: +{% Movement Speed. Doesn't work if you're above 170% move speed already.

Refinery6.desc: +{% Cooking Mastery EXP gain, a feature unlocked via Rift 61 deep in World 4.
